sentences.arabic: أَظُنُّ أَنَّ الْعَمَلَ الْجَمَاعِيَّ أَفْضَلُ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ الْفَرْدِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Mislim da je timski rad bolji od individualnog rada.
sentences.translationEn: I think that teamwork is better than individual work.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ نَعْمَلُ مَعًا نُنْجِزُ أَكْثَرَ فِي وَقْتٍ أَقَلَّ.
sentences.translation: Kada radimo zajedno, postignemo više u kraćem vremenu.
sentences.translationEn: When we work together we achieve more in less time.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ شَخْصٍ يَجْلِبُ فِكْرَةً جَدِيدَةً لِلْمَجْمُوعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba donosi grupi novu ideju.
sentences.translationEn: Every person brings a new idea to the group.

sentences.arabic: أُفَضِّلُ الْعَمَلَ مَعَ الْآخَرِينَ لِأَنَّهُ مُمْتِعٌ.
sentences.translation: Više volim raditi s drugima jer je zabavno.
sentences.translationEn: I prefer working with others because it is enjoyable.
